tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P1] Delete old scanners and their tests
tasks.description:
Remove the two old scanner implementations now that the unified scanner replaces them.

**Files to delete:**
- `apps/server/src/services/discovery/discovery-scanner.ts` (Scanner A)
- `apps/server/src/services/discovery/__tests__/discovery-scanner.test.ts` (Scanner A tests)
- `packages/mesh/src/discovery-engine.ts` (Scanner B)

**Files to check for stale imports:**
- `apps/server/src/routes/discovery.ts` — should no longer import from `discovery-scanner.ts` (already updated in task 1.4)
- `packages/mesh/src/mesh-core.ts` — should no longer import from `discovery-engine.ts` (already updated in task 1.3)
- `packages/mesh/src/index.ts` — remove any re-exports of `discovery-engine.ts`
- `apps/server/src/services/discovery/index.ts` — if a barrel exists, update it

**Verify:** Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm test -- --run` to ensure no broken imports remain.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `discovery-scanner.ts` deleted
- [ ] `discovery-scanner.test.ts` deleted
- [ ] `discovery-engine.ts` deleted
- [ ] No remaining imports reference deleted files
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P2] Update onboarding UI to use shared discovery hook and canonical types
tasks.description:
Update `AgentDiscoveryStep.tsx` and `AgentCard.tsx` in the onboarding flow to use the shared `useDiscoveryScan` hook from `entities/discovery/` and the canonical `DiscoveryCandidate` type.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/AgentDiscoveryStep.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/AgentCard.tsx`

**File to delete:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/model/use-discovery-scan.ts`

**Changes to AgentDiscoveryStep.tsx:**

1. Replace import:
```diff
- import { useDiscoveryScan, type ScanCandidate } from '../model/use-discovery-scan';
+ import { useDiscoveryScan } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
+ import type { DiscoveryCandidate } from '@dorkos/shared/mesh-schemas';
```

2. Replace `ScanCandidate` with `DiscoveryCandidate` throughout the component.

3. The `startScan()` call (which previously called the old hook that sent raw fetch to the SSE endpoint) becomes `scan()` with no arguments — the server defaults to the boundary (home directory).

4. Replace any references to the old hook's state properties (`candidates`, `isScanning`, `progress`, `error`) — these should come from the shared hook with the same names.

**Changes to AgentCard.tsx:**

The candidate shape may differ. Scanner A's `ScanCandidate` had:
- `name` (basename of path)
- `markers` (array of marker names)
- `gitBranch`, `gitRemote`
- `hasDorkManifest`

The canonical `DiscoveryCandidate` has:
- `path`
- `strategy` (string)
- `hints` (object with optional `name`, `description`, etc.)
- `discoveredAt`

Update the `AgentCard` component to:
- Derive display name from `candidate.hints?.name ?? path.basename(candidate.path)`
- Show `candidate.strategy` instead of marker list
- Remove git branch/remote display (not available in canonical type)
- Use `candidate.hints` for any additional metadata

**Also update the onboarding barrel** (`features/onboarding/index.ts`) to remove the `useDiscoveryScan` re-export if present.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Old `use-discovery-scan.ts` in onboarding is deleted
- [ ] `AgentDiscoveryStep` uses `useDiscoveryScan` from `entities/discovery/`
- [ ] `AgentCard` uses canonical `DiscoveryCandidate` type
- [ ] Scan starts with no arguments (server defaults to boundary)
- [ ] Progressive results still appear with staggered animation
- [ ] Progress indicator shows scanned dirs and found agents
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Updating onboarding UI to use shared discovery hook

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P2] Update mesh panel DiscoveryView to use shared discovery hook
tasks.description:
Update the mesh panel's `DiscoveryView.tsx` to use the shared `useDiscoveryScan` hook instead of the batch `useDiscoverAgents` mutation. This gives the mesh panel progressive streaming results.

**Files to modify:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/DiscoveryView.tsx` (or similar — find the component that calls `useDiscoverAgents`)
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/index.ts`

**File to delete:**
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/model/use-mesh-discover.ts` (or wherever `useDiscoverAgents` is defined)

**Changes to DiscoveryView.tsx:**

1. Replace imports:
```diff
- import { useDiscoverAgents, useMeshScanRoots, ... } from '@/layers/entities/mesh';
+ import { useDiscoveryScan } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
+ import { useMeshScanRoots, ... } from '@/layers/entities/mesh';
```

2. Replace the `discover()` mutation with `scan()` from the shared hook:
```diff
- const { mutate: discover, isPending, data } = useDiscoverAgents();
+ const { candidates, isScanning, progress, error, scan } = useDiscoveryScan();
```

3. Update the scan trigger:
```diff
- onClick={() => discover({ roots: scanRoots, maxDepth })}
+ onClick={() => scan(scanRoots, maxDepth)}
```

4. Results now come from the Zustand store (progressive) instead of mutation response (batch). Update rendering to use `candidates` directly.

5. Add progress display if not already present — show `progress.scannedDirs` and `progress.foundAgents` during scan.

**Update mesh entity barrel** (`entities/mesh/index.ts`):
- Remove `useDiscoverAgents` export

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Old `useDiscoverAgents` / `use-mesh-discover.ts` is deleted
- [ ] Mesh panel uses `useDiscoveryScan` from `entities/discovery/`
- [ ] Results stream progressively (candidates appear one-by-one)
- [ ] Scan roots from settings are passed through
- [ ] Progress indicator shows during scan
- [ ] Shared state works: scanning in onboarding shows results in mesh panel
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
tasks.activeForm: Updating mesh panel to use shared discovery hook

tasks.subject: [unify-discovery-system] [P3] Remove unused imports, types, and update documentation
tasks.description:
Final cleanup pass to remove stale references and update project documentation.

**Cleanup tasks:**

1. **Remove stale imports:** Run `pnpm typecheck` and fix any remaining import errors across the codebase. Search for:
   - References to `discovery-scanner` or `scanForAgents` (Scanner A)
   - References to `discovery-engine` or `scanDirectory` (Scanner B)
   - References to `ScanCandidate` (the old onboarding type)
   - References to `useDiscoverAgents` (the old mesh hook)
   - The old `use-discovery-scan.ts` in onboarding

2. **Remove stale type definitions:** If the old `ScanCandidate` interface or `DiscoveryCandidate` from Scanner A still exists in any file, remove it.

3. **Update `CLAUDE.md`:**
   - In the services list, remove the `discovery-scanner.ts` entry
   - Add `entities/discovery/` to the FSD layers table with columns: `entities/discovery/` | `useDiscoveryStore, useDiscoveryScan` | `Shared discovery scan state`
   - Update the `discovery-engine.ts` reference to point to the new `packages/mesh/src/discovery/` directory
   - Update the discovery route description to mention meshCore dependency

4. **Update `contributing/architecture.md`:**
   - Document the unified discovery system
   - Mention the Transport `scan()` method
   - Note that scan results are shared across features via Zustand store

5. **Verify all tests pass:**
   ```bash
   pnpm test -- --run
   pnpm typecheck
   pnpm lint
   ```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] No references to deleted files remain in the codebase
- [ ] No unused type definitions remain
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated with new entity and corrected service references
- [ ] `contributing/architecture.md` updated
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (or only pre-existing warnings)
tasks.activeForm: Removing unused imports and updating documentation
